description: 92 - 25-02-2025 - Emails between Peter Mandelson and Jonathan Powell (National
text:
Security Adviser, No.10), and others

From: Peter Mandelson < Personal >

Sent: Tue 25/02/2025 9:03:34 PM (UTC)

To: Jonathan Powell < Personal >, "Ailsa Terry (No.10)"
< Personal >, Matthew Doyle < Personal —
"michael.ellam Personal "

_— <michaelellam Personal = >
James Roscoe < Personal >, Mungo Woodifield

Personal
Subject: Re: PM POTUS

eK

Ihave now discussed the visit arrangements with if anyone wants a call

Get Outlook for iOS

From: Jonathan Powell< Personal = >
Sent: Tuesday, February 25, 2025 4:02:40 PM

Matthew Doyle < Personal > Personal

<michael.ellam Personal >

Cc: James Roscoe < Personal >; Mungo Woodifield < Personal

Subject: Re: PM POTUS

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

RK

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

From: Ailsa Terry Personal
Sent: Tuesday, February 25, 2025 7:40:42 PM

To: Peter Mandelson < Personal >; Jonathan Powell < Personal
Matthew Doyle < Personal > Personal
< Personal S

Cc: James Roscoe < Personal >; Mungo Woodifield < Personal

278

Subject: RE: PM POTUS
OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

Thanks Peter — very helpful. | am not planning on sharing the readout of the trade
call with the PM tonight, we can talk him through on the plane and on arrival.

@Maitthew Doyle and copyees can update on WH discussions, most of which are
being done through the BEW team as far as | am aware.

OFFICIAL-SENSITIVE

From: Peter Mandelson < Personal >
Sent: 25 February 2025 19:36
To: Jonathan Powell Personal >; Ailsa Terry < Personal >; Matthew
Doyle< | Personal >; michael.ellam Personal
Cc: James Roscoe < Personal >; Mungo Woodifield
< Personal >
Subject: PM POTUS

My reading of Thursday is that we are baa

In the meanwhile, we want wae

Where we should be concentrating “

ee

279


Very best
Peter

parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
